title: epidendrum isthmi
intro: Epidendrum isthmi, also known as the Isthmus Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Isthmus Orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum isthmi include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the Isthmus Orchid can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
